title: Add platform-specific remediation hints to preflight dependency checks

comments.author: driver--add-platform-specific-remediation-hints-to-preflight
comments.content: Plan: Extract platform detection into a detect_platform() helper that returns an enum (Linux{Debian,Fedora,Arch,Other}, MacOS, Windows, Other). Refactor each dependency's remediation hint in preflight_check() to use this enum for targeted install instructions. Add platform-specific hints for: claude CLI, gh CLI, docker, podman. The timeout and tmux hints already have some platform awareness - enhance those too. Add tests for the new platform detection and hint formatting.
